PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('match_request_method')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=~)('=~')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('validate_re')
          PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
            PsiElement(()('(')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('match_request_method')
            PsiElement(,)(',')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''^(put|post|get|head|delete)$'')
            PsiElement())(')')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(ELSIF)('elsif')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('match_request_method')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=~)('=~')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Array')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionCallImpl(EXPRESSION_CALL)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('match_request_method')
          PsiElement(.)('.')
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('each')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetAnonymousBlockImpl(ANONYMOUS_BLOCK)
            PsiPuppetPipedParametersListBlockImpl(PIPED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
              PsiElement(|)('|')
              PsiPuppetParameterImpl(PARAMETER)
                Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                  PsiElement($)('$')
                  PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('method')
              PsiElement(|)('|')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
              PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
                PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(NAME)('validate_re')
                PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
                  PsiElement(()('(')
                  Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                    PsiElement($)('$')
                    PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('method')
                  PsiElement(,)(',')
                  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                  PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                    PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''^(put|post|get|head|delete)$'')
                  PsiElement())(')')
              PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
